name: Single filer at high income
description: High earner at €100,000 in Spain - above Social Security max base

sources.description: Verified using Python script implementing official IRPF calculation per Ley 35/2006
sources.verification_method: Python script verify_es_2026.py implementing tax credit method per Ley 35/2006 Articles 56-57
sources.notes: IRPF: Tax on (Gross - SS) minus tax on mínimo personal €5,550. SS: 6.50% capped at €61,214.40 = €3,978.94. Tax credit: €1,054.50. Solidarity: progressive brackets on €38,785.60 excess = €82.68. CORRECTED 2026-03-07.
